title: feed poller creates a new reqwest::Client per poll call
description:
feed.rs poll_feed() constructs a new reqwest::Client on every invocation (line 17). reqwest::Client is designed to be reused: it holds a connection pool, TLS session cache, and DNS cache. Creating it fresh on every poll means:
- No connection reuse to the feed server
- No TLS session resumption  
- DNS resolved on every poll

The client is already created correctly in server.rs and delivery.rs and passed via AppState or worker state. Fix: add the client to FeedConfig or pass it as a parameter to poll_feed and run_poller.
close_reason: P1-P3 fixes: unwrap replaced, INSERT OR IGNORE dedup, X-Real-IP, zeroizing noted, prune wired, strip_suffix, SSRF guard, shared client, dead code removed, issue refs added
